name: Scalloped Cheesy Tuna
recipeIngredient: 2 cans of tuna, 6 1/2 oz each (water pack)
3 cups medium-term sauce or mushroom soup
3/4 cup grated jack cheese or more
1/4 cup diced onions, less if desired
8 ounces noodles, thick or thin, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Drain the tuna and blend gently with soup or medium cream sauce.
3. Arrange all ingredients in alternate layers except corn flakes and melted butter in a slightly buttered 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
4. Sprinkle with corn flakes and drizzle melted butter over all.
5. Bake for approximately 35 minutes, or until the top is slightly brown and bubbly.
